message:
feat(calibrate): add Bayesian credible bounds and PAC-Bayes analysis

Extends calibration module with statistical bounds for error rate estimation:

New modules:
- bounds.rs: Bayesian credible bounds for error rates
  - Beta posterior computation: e ~ Beta(a+k, b+n-k)
  - Upper credible bounds at configurable delta levels
  - WindowSpec for time-bounded analysis
  - CredibleBoundAssumptions for documenting methodology

- pac_bayes.rs: PAC-Bayes bounds for generalization guarantees
  - McAllester-style bounds for sample complexity
  - Prior-data conflict detection
  - Margin-based analysis for calibrated classifiers

Updated modules:
- queries.rs: Extended trial counting for bounds computation
- report.rs: Include credible bounds in calibration reports
- mod.rs: Re-export new types

These bounds enable gating more aggressive robot thresholds behind
statistical guarantees, ensuring we don't deploy changes until we have
sufficient evidence of safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
